archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) applied with Cyber Security Accents
vibe: Cybersecurity / Threat Detection Tool. Authoritative, secure, and highly technical. Dense, functional, 'Control Room' feel.

headings.family_recommendation: Outfit or Space Grotesk (if strictly technical), but default to a sharp clean sans like Inter if custom fonts fail. However, for headers use tracking-tight to create tension.

body.family_recommendation: IBM Plex Mono or JetBrains Mono for all data points, inputs, and table content.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6. Generous padding in macro containers, dense padding in data widgets.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-4. Every pixel must be utilized with high-density bento blocks.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms. Center alignment only for empty states or macro headers.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm. Keep it sharp and brutalist.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-slate-900), 1px solid border (border-slate-800). No soft shadows. Use sharp inner contrasts.
surfaces.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/80 border-b border-slate-800 for sticky headers or navbars.
surfaces.terminal_panels: Deep black background, border-cyan-500/20, text-cyan-400 font-mono for raw logs/threat feeds.

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 text-slate-950 font-bold hover:bg-cyan-400 rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-700 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm

forms.inputs: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 text-white focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 rounded-sm font-mono text-sm
forms.labels: text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono mb-2 block

charts_and_data.style: Use Recharts. Deep slate backgrounds with neon cyan/rose lines. Avoid filled areas unless highly transparent.
charts_and_data.gauges: Risk Score Dashboard MUST use a large typography metric (e.g., 85/100 in rose-500) paired with a visual threat bar (Safe/Medium/High segments).

motion.hover: Slight border highlight or text brightness increase. No bouncy transforms.
motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for interactive elements.
motion.data_feed: Use subtle pulsing opacity (animate-pulse) on live threat indicators.

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use the hero abstract for auth screens or extension mockups. Use suspect profiles in the history/scan list. Never use placeholder URLs.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, forms, risk score displays, and threat banners MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='risk-score-value').
